name: Anpu the Jackal-Forged
dialogue: I am the one who measures hearts.
Every trainer who survives the Pharaoh comes through me next. None pass on the first hour.
Your heart against the feather. Lighter wins. Heavier becomes sand.
preBattleLine: Anpu lowers the bronze scales. The needle trembles toward you.
postDefeatDialogue: Anpu lifts the scales. The needle holds.
He presses a black scarab into your palm. "Show this in the lower halls. They will not bar you."
prereqBlockedMessage: Anpu's scales lie still. "The Pharaoh has not weighed you yet. Return to him first."
